commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Dual-NIC hardware spec (docs/research/HORIZON2_HARDWARE_SPEC.md)
- XDP_REDIRECT prototype (src/network/ebpf/experimental/)
- AF_XDP RFC + Go bridge (docs/research/RFC_AF_XDP_INTEGRATION.md)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(horizon-2): XDP_REDIRECT prototype + AF_XDP bridge + hardware spec

- src/network/ebpf/experimental/xdp_redirect_prototype.c: BPF program
  using BPF_MAP_TYPE_DEVMAP + bpf_redirect_map to bypass kernel stack
  for mesh transit traffic on MESH_PORT 26969; per-CPU perf_stats counters
- src/network/ebpf/experimental/afxdp_bridge.go: Go bridge prototype
  linking to pinned XSKMAP; UMEM allocation pending i40e/ixgbe hardware
- docs/research/HORIZON2_HARDWARE_SPEC.md: dual-NIC testbed spec
  (Intel X710-DA2 / X520-DA2 / mlx5), DAC cable topology, pktgen setup
- docs/research/RFC_AF_XDP_INTEGRATION.md: XDP_REDIRECT + AF_XDP RFC,
  XSKMAP design, zero-copy vs copy-mode, Go integration, honest gate:
  1M+ PPS requires Native XDP on i40e/ixgbe, not achievable on virtio

feat(release): add v1.1_GA_MANIFEST.json — official GA freeze artifact

Assembles the VERIFIED / VERIFIED IN CI / NOT CLAIMED boundary:
- VERIFIED: eBPF 49RX/142k TX + 99.8M/s Go-level, 5G E2E VPS, Ghost
  Protocol, PQC FIPS 203/204, Zero-Trust SPIRE, CI keyless provenance
  (run 22822503867), MaaS 10k+ unit tests
- VERIFIED IN CI: Rekor transparency log, MTTR synthetic baseline
  (MTTD=10.6s MTTR=52.7s), Go dataplane bench gate
- NOT CLAIMED: 1M+ PPS hardware, 24h soak, K8s CNI, carrier-grade 5G,
  Rekor log indices

fix(ci): use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF for keyless verify-blob identity

The hardcoded --certificate-identity referenced the wrong org
(x0tta6bl4 vs x0tta6bl4-ai) and wrong workflow file (ci.yml vs
ebpf-release-signing.yml). Use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF which GitHub
Actions sets automatically to the exact subject embedded in the
keyless OIDC certificate.

commit.message:
feat: dynamic difficulty scoring for question generators

Replace hardcoded difficulty pools with an emergent difficulty formula
that measures how hard each question actually is based on:
- Date score: how old is the event (capped at 40 years)
- Familiarity score: how well-known is the league/competition globally
- Fame score: LLM-assessed iconicity of the specific event (1-10)

Key changes:
- Add DifficultyFactors interface and LEAGUE_FAMILIARITY_TIERS to question.types.ts
- New DifficultyScorer service with formula: 0.25*date + 0.35*familiarity + 0.40*fame
- Board assembly: generate 5 candidates per category (30 total), score all,
  fill 6x3=18 slots greedily with rebucketing fallback for empty slots
- All 6 generators now generateRaw() without a hardcoded difficulty param;
  LLM generators ask for event_year/competition/fame_score in schema;
  seed banks annotated with manual DifficultyFactors
- difficulty_factors stripped from client-facing responses in both
  QuestionsService.getQuestionById and GameService.getQuestion
- TOP_5 now has 3 slots (EASY/MEDIUM/HARD) instead of 2 for a full 18-cell board

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: switch document analysis from Anthropic to Google Gemini

- Replace Claude Sonnet with Gemini 2.0 Flash for document analysis
- Use native Gemini API (no SDK needed) with JSON response mode
- Free tier: 1500 requests/day (sufficient for CondoDaily)
- Env var: GEMINI_API_KEY (replaces ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve critical API communication mismatches

Fixes 4 critical/high severity API contract issues identified during
comprehensive backend-frontend communication inspection.

## Critical Fixes (2)

### 1. Fix entity_links UUID type mismatch
**File**: backend/app/schemas/source.py:143

**Problem**: Frontend sends UUID strings, backend expected UUID objects.
Caused potential validation failures in extraction save operations.

**Fix**: Changed `entity_links: dict[str, UUID]` to `dict[str, str]`
Added comment explaining UUID conversion happens in service layer.

**Impact**: Extraction save operations now properly handle UUID strings
from frontend, eliminating type coercion edge cases.

### 2. Fix extracted relation roles type inconsistency
**File**: frontend/src/types/extraction.ts:62

**Problem**: Frontend allowed EITHER `ExtractedRole[]` OR `Record<string, string>`.
Backend only accepts array format, Record format would fail validation.

**Fix**: Removed `Record<string, string>` from union type.
Now only accepts: `roles: ExtractedRole[]`

**Impact**: Type safety enforced, prevents frontend from sending invalid
role format that would be rejected by backend.

## High Priority Fixes (2)

### 3. Remove duplicate entity terms routes
**File**: backend/app/api/entities.py:128-225

**Problem**: Entity terms CRUD routes defined in TWO files:
- backend/app/api/entities.py (as sub-routes)
- backend/app/api/entity_terms.py (dedicated router)

Caused route duplication and potential routing conflicts.

**Fix**: Removed all entity terms routes from entities.py
- Deleted GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /entities/{id}/terms endpoints
- Removed unused imports: EntityTermWrite, EntityTermRead, etc.
- Routes properly maintained in entity_terms.py

**Impact**: Eliminated routing ambiguity, single source of truth for
entity terms API.

### 4. Remove duplicate trust field
**File**: frontend/src/types/source.ts:11

**Problem**: SourceRead interface had BOTH fields:
- `trust_level?: number | null` (backend returns this)
- `trust?: number | null` (backend doesn't return this)

Frontend code accessing `.trust` would get undefined.

**Fix**: Removed duplicate `trust` field.
Standardized on `trust_level` only.

**Impact**: Eliminates potential null reference errors, aligns with
backend schema.

## API Communication Audit

### New: docs/architecture/API_COMMUNICATION_AUDIT.md (650+ lines)

Comprehensive audit report documenting:

**Findings**:
- 2 Critical issues (fixed in this commit)
- 2 High severity issues (fixed in this commit)
- 3 Medium severity issues (documented for next sprint)
- 2 Low severity issues (technical debt)

**Documentation Includes**:
1. Detailed issue descriptions with file locations
2. Problem analysis and risk assessment
3. Recommended action plan (Phases 1-3)
4. Testing requirements and prevention strategies
5. API request flow diagram
6. File checklist for remaining issues

**Prevention Strategies**:
- Automated TypeScript generation from Pydantic schemas
- API contract testing with Pact
- OpenAPI spec validation in CI/CD
- Code review checklist

## Impact

✅ **Type Safety**: Frontend and backend types now match exactly
✅ **Route Clarity**: No duplicate endpoint definitions
✅ **Field Consistency**: No ambiguous field naming
✅ **Validation**: Extraction save operations properly validated
✅ **Documentation**: Complete audit trail for future reference

All critical backend-frontend communication issues resolved.
Remaining medium/low priority issues documented for follow-up.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Happy <yesreply@happy.engineering>

fix(auth): replace INITIAL_SESSION listener with direct getSession() on mount

Root cause: in @supabase/supabase-js@2.97.0, INITIAL_SESSION can fire during
module initialization, before useEffect runs and registers the onAuthStateChange
listener. Result: spinner hangs forever with no network requests, no errors,
and no console output — INITIAL_SESSION was simply missed.

Solution: call supabase.auth.getSession() directly in useEffect on mount.
getSession() reads cookies from document.cookie synchronously (non-httpOnly
thanks to middleware fix) without depending on async SDK events. If the access
token is expired, getSession() auto-refreshes via the refresh token.

Changes:
- Remove 100+ lines of INITIAL_SESSION handling (race conditions, resync fetch,
  sessionStorage flags, fallback timeout, nested try/catches)
- Add init() async function: getSession() → processSession()
- onAuthStateChange now handles only SIGNED_IN, TOKEN_REFRESHED, SIGNED_OUT
- Add active flag to prevent state updates after unmount
- Remove unused AuthChangeEvent import
- Remove sessionStorage.removeItem('auth_resync_attempted') from processSession

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v1.4.2: reset frame_index and last_frame_time on each celebration

_build_frames was reloading frames but leaving frame_index and
last_frame_time at their end-of-previous-celebration values, causing
subsequent celebrations to start mid-sequence or appear static.

Classify UnaryReductionNor → §11.4.9 [skip ci]

The unary reduction NOR operator (~|, TokenKind::kTildePipe) is defined in §11.4.9 "Reduction operators", which covers all unary reduction operators including AND, OR, XOR and their inverses (NAND, NOR, XNOR).

commit.message:
fix: stop appending trailing content to AI response text (#478)

When JSON.parse() finds valid JSON followed by trailing content, the
recovery code was appending that trailing content to the text field.
This was a workaround from before <<<RAW_OUTPUT>>> blocks existed.

Now that ProbeAgent uses <<<RAW_OUTPUT>>> delimiters for legitimate
output buffer content, the trailing append is unnecessary and causes
the AI's echoed schema definition to leak into user-visible responses.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
고객 앱 완성: Phase 2-4 전체 페이지 추가

Phase 2: 신뢰 구축 페이지
- Feat: 리뷰/후기 페이지 추가 (/reviews)
  - 평점/증상 유형별 필터 기능
  - 당근마켓 스타일 리뷰 카드 그리드
  - 페이지네이션 지원
- Feat: FAQ/고객센터 페이지 추가 (/faq)
  - 토스 스타일 아코디언 UI
  - 카테고리별 필터 (서비스, 결제, 보험, 매칭)
  - 검색 기능 (JavaScript)
  - 채팅/이메일 문의 CTA

Phase 3: 사용성 개선 페이지
- Feat: 온보딩 플로우 구현
  - 4단계 슬라이드 (누수 해결, AI 진단, 전문가 매칭, 보험청구)
  - Stimulus 컨트롤러로 애니메이션 구현
  - 로컬 스토리지로 중복 표시 방지
- Feat: 알림 설정 페이지 추가 (/customers/settings/notifications)
  - 토스 스타일 토글 스위치
  - 알림 수단 설정 (이메일, 푸시, SMS)
  - 알림 유형 설정 (견적, 공사, 보험, 마케팅)
- Feat: 결제 내역 페이지 추가 (/customers/payments)
  - 통계 카드 (총 결제 금액, 진행 중 금액)
  - 상태별 필터 (대기, 입금, 완료, 환불)
  - 페이지네이션 지원

Phase 4: 선택 기능 페이지
- Feat: 이벤트/쿠폰 페이지 추가 (/events)
  - 토스 스타일 그라디언트 이벤트 카드
  - 4가지 이벤트 (첫 체크 할인, 친구 초대, 리뷰 작성, 보험청구)
  - 내 쿠폰함 (로그인 시)
- Feat: 설정 페이지 추가 (/customers/settings)
  - 당근마켓 스타일 설정 메뉴
  - 프로필/비밀번호/알림/결제 관리 링크
  - FAQ, 고객센터, 약관 바로가기
  - 회원 탈퇴 (빨간색 경고)

Technical:
- PagesController에 reviews, faq, events 액션 추가
- Customers::SettingsController 신규 생성
- Customers::Settings::NotificationsController 신규 생성
- Customers::PaymentsController에 index 액션 추가
- onboarding_controller.js (Stimulus) 신규 생성
- 라우트 추가: reviews, faq, events, settings, payments

commit.message:
feat: HAR data enrichment — discover, analyzer, collector

- discover: add ParamDetail struct with type inference (numeric, uuid,
  email, url, boolean), extract POST body fields, response JSON fields,
  API version detection from HAR entries
- analyzer: add 10 new rules — error detection (verbose-error-4xx,
  framework-error-page, debug-mode, verbose-500, db-connection-error,
  path-disclosure), PII (ssn, credit-card), missing headers (hsts,
  x-content-type-options)
- collector: add CORS extraction from HAR, error response extraction,
  3 new investigation generators (CORS HAR, error response, API version),
  unauth_endpoint investigations for all non-static endpoints,
  enhanced IDOR/SSRF generators with enriched param data
- provider: add "still running" heartbeat log every 30s in progress monitor
- All investigation prompts in English

commit.message:
perf: optimize slow queries, vectorize features save, add covering indexes

- DB indexes: add 6 missing/covering indexes
  - picks (stock_id), jobs (started_at), jobs (status)
  - raw_prices/institutional/margin_short (trading_date, stock_id)
    covering indexes for GROUP BY COUNT(DISTINCT) queries
- dashboard.py: fetch_recent_coverage() adds WHERE date range filter
  GROUP BY queries: 2s → 0.04s (53x) by scanning only recent days
- build_features.py save loop: iterrows → numpy to_numpy + zip
  15k → 380k rows/s (25x); BATCH_SIZE 1000→5000 (5x fewer commits)
  Estimated 10y full rebuild save: 1051s → ~220s
- DB connection pool already configured: pool_size=10, max_overflow=20
- scripts/check_db_indexes.py: add new covering indexes to expected list
- CLAUDE.md: document perf baselines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 카카오톡 인앱 브라우저 → 외부 브라우저 강제 리다이렉트

카카오톡 공유 링크 클릭 시 인앱 브라우저에서 네이미 챗봇 등이
동작하지 않는 문제 해결. iOS는 kakaotalk://web/openExternal,
Android는 intent:// 스킴으로 Safari/Chrome 자동 전환.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PDF remplissage par drawText aux coordonnées exactes des Rects

form.getFields() retournait [] car les champs AcroForm sont stockés dans
un cross-reference object stream compressé (PDF 1.5) non remonté par
pdf-lib. Solution : drawText aux coordonnées exactes extraites par
inspection binaire du PDF (text_1jvif/nom, text_2usrw/niveau,
text_3tbhf/heures, text_4bpvt/date) + fond blanc + form.flatten().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: 地图全面优化 - 清除emoji、修复热力图、优化布局

## 主要变更

### 1. 清除所有emoji表情
- index.html: 移除标题、下拉菜单、图例中的所有emoji
- js/data/china-market-data.js: 清除数据维度icon字段中的emoji
- js/projects-renderer.js: 清除项目状态emoji（已上线、筹备中）
- 提升页面专业度，统一设计风格

### 2. 修复热力图显示效果
- 优化visualMap配置，调整图例位置和尺寸
- left: 2%, bottom: 3%，itemHeight: 140
- 确保数据颜色渐变明显，从浅到深清晰可见

### 3. 移除省份名称，只显示数值
- 地图标签不再显示省份名称（如"广东"）
- 只显示格式化后的数值（如"250.0万辆"）
- 减少视觉混乱，突出数据本身
- 鼠标悬停时数值放大并加粗

### 4. 优化地图横向布局
- 地图容器增加max-width: 1400px
- 高度从600px调整为550px
- margin: 0 auto 居中显示
- 减少左右两侧空白，更符合横向视觉习惯

## 技术细节

**标签显示优化：**
- 默认：fontSize: 12px, fontWeight: 500
- 悬停：fontSize: 14px, fontWeight: bold, color: #D4AF37
- 格式化：>=1亿显示"X.0亿"，>=1万显示"X.0万"

**视觉Map优化：**
- 水平布局，底部显示
- 图例高度140px，更清晰的颜色对比

## 响应式支持
- 1024px及以下：高度450px
- 768px及以下：高度350px
- 480px及以下：高度280px

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fixed 2 broken/truncated meta descriptions (SRQ airport, best-time-to-visit)
- Lazy-loaded Hostaway calendar.js (548KB) on 5 property pages via IntersectionObserver
- Extracted inline CSS to /css/stays-base.css and /css/email-popup.css (~751KB total savings)
- Added loading="lazy" and decoding="async" to images across 130+ pages
- Made Google Fonts non-blocking on 124 stays/PM pages
- Fixed duplicate fetchpriority attribute on homepage hero

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: KPIダッシュボード整理 — テーブル統合・BE除外・チャート分割

- ファネル進捗テーブルと3月ローンチテーブルを1つに統合（移行率カラム追加）
- バックエンド購入をファネルテーブル・カード・チャートから除外
- ローンチ推移チャートを教育推移（3/8〜）とセミナー推移（セミナー期間）に分割
- Lstep同期ボタン削除（cron自動化済み）
- FunnelAnalysisSection削除（統合済み）
- dailyMetricsタグマッピング修正（3M:特典受取→3M:動画LP遷移）

- home.nix: add nb (note-taking CLI) package
- fish.nix: add nbs (fzf note search) and nb-ai (Claude-powered note gen) functions
- starship.nix: disable gcloud module in prompt
- sway.nix: add screenshotAndTransfer script (copy + scp to vultr), update
  screenshot keybindings to use new script, reduce font size to 13, add focus_wrapping
- tmux.nix: add tmux-jump plugin (prefix+j), remove F12 remote mode toggle,
  remove tm-switch binding, remap copy-mode to prefix+k with fcitx5 toggle,
  add home.activation to auto-reload tmux config after home-manager switch

repository.name: nixos-config
repository.description: NixOS + Home Manager configuration

commit.message:
Maximise preset button and AI response text size for readability

Presets bumped to text-lg with more padding, removed uppercase and
letter-spacing so more text fits per line at a larger size. AI response
uses prose-lg/prose-xl for properly scaled typography. Optimised for
elderly users on mobile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: NWN-Bustimes
repository.description: Real-time bus departures and AI transit assistant for North West Norfolk

commit.message:
fix: correct tier structure for locked platform cards on AEO report

- Remove enterprise tier (does not exist) — TendorAI has Free/Starter/Pro only
- Starter (£149/mo) unlocks Perplexity + ChatGPT + Claude (3 platforms)
- Pro (£299/mo) unlocks all 6 platforms (adds Gemini, Grok, Meta AI)
- Free tier shows 5 locked cards: 2 for Starter, 3 for Pro
- "You're seeing X of 6" text now dynamic based on tier, not hardcoded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
